title: Update wdio-mocha-framework to version 0.5.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [wdio-mocha-framework](https://www.npmjs.com/package/wdio-mocha-framework) just published its new version 0.5.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency wdio-mocha-framework
New version 0.5.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of wdio-mocha-framework. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 4 commits . - [`cc989a6`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/cc989a627c72e69de9fdbc0830a256638c0e8ed7) v0.5.0 - [`5ac32dc`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/5ac32dc320cd8c8076cf6d54653e5d2899e3f938) Update contributors - [`3ea3718`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/3ea371878ecce761b31b1c69f3ac3b8bbcd244fb) applied minor changes to support v3 - [`b3f3dea`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/b3f3dea52dfbf5c947bc9e8442a729d5c32771cf) bumped mocha version to v3 See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/compare/1df4f754a7795801867e533c87c466b21bc2fbcc...cc989a627c72e69de9fdbc0830a256638c0e8ed7). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
